document_type: Exam Preparation Sample Tasks and Examiner Comments
recommended_outputs: Practice prompts for Task 1 and Task 2
reason: The document is educational exam-preparation material for IELTS Academic Writing. It explains Task 1 and Task 2 requirements, provides sample writing tasks, candidate scripts, band scores and examiner comments, making it best suited to study and revision.
warnings: Some sample candidate scripts appear as images or are not fully captured in the extracted text, so analysis should rely mainly on task prompts and examiner comments.
The document includes official IELTS assessment guidance, but the sample responses are stated not to be definitive examples of any particular band score.
